ideation: This sequence simulates the act of painting with a paintbrush, focusing on the right arm's movement. The left arm remains relatively still to provide balance and contrast. The sequence starts with the right arm extended forward, the hand angled downward to hold the paintbrush. Then, the arm sweeps across, mimicking a painting stroke. Finally, it returns to the initial position, ready for the next stroke. The left arm remains in a relaxed position to highlight the movement of the right arm.

frames.beat: right arm extends, brush poised downwards
the arm sweeps across, making a bold stroke
the brush returns, ready for the next mark
